pattern: Two pointers skip non-vowels and swap the vowels they land on, reversing only the vowel subsequence while every other character stays put.
hints: Only the vowels move; consonants and other characters keep their positions exactly.
Walk one pointer from the left and one from the right, advancing each until it sits on a vowel.
When both pointers rest on vowels, swap them, step both inward, and repeat until they cross.

edge_inputs.description: mixed case vowels reverse keeping case
string with no vowels is unchanged
uppercase and lowercase vowels swap positions
vowels separated by spaces and symbols

stress.description: long string of letters with a healthy share of vowels
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    pool = 'aeiouAEIOU' + 'bcdfghjklmnpqrstvwxyz'
    return [''.join(pool[rng.randrange(len(pool))] for _ in range(n))]
stress.note: vowels appear frequently to exercise many swaps
